con:settings.con:setting: <xml-fragment xmlns:con="http://eviware.com/soapui/config"> <con:entry key="Report Format(s)" value=""/> <con:entry key="Host:Port" value=""/> <con:entry key="Export JUnit Results" value="false"/> <con:entry key="Export All" value="false"/> <con:entry key="Save After" value="false"/> <con:entry key="Add Settings" value="false"/> <con:entry key="WSS Password Type" value=""/> <con:entry key="TestSuite" value="TestINtC"/> <con:entry key="Endpoint" value=""/> <con:entry key="Select Report Type" value=""/> <con:entry key="System Properties" value=""/> <con:entry key="Password" value=""/> <con:entry key="Print Report" value="false"/> <con:entry key="Open Report" value="false"/> <con:entry key="Export JUnit Results with test properties" value="false"/> <con:entry key="Global Properties" value=""/> <con:entry key="Project Properties" value=""/> <con:entry key="Project Password" value=""/> <con:entry key="TestCase" value="<all>"/> <con:entry key="Username" value=""/> <con:entry key="user-settings.xml Password" value=""/> <con:entry key="TestRunner Path" value=""/> <con:entry key="Environment" value="Default"/> <con:entry key="Coverage Report" value="false"/> <con:entry key="Enable UI" value="false"/> <con:entry key="Root Folder" value=""/> <con:entry key="Ignore Errors" value="false"/> <con:entry key="Domain" value=""/> <con:entry key="Tool Args" value=""/> <con:entry key="Save Project" value="false"/> </xml-fragment>

con:resource.name: Common - Get Address From Third Level
Common - Query Address From Third Level 1
Common - Query Contact From First Level
Common - Query Contact From Second Level
Common - Query Contact From Third Level
Common - Query Contact From Third Level
Common - Query first level distribution channel by company by id
Common - Query first level distribution channel by company
Common - Query line of business validation date
Common - Query line of business by deals
Common - Query second level distribution channel by firsrt level
Common - Query sector by sector value
Common - Query subsector list by sector
Common - Query Third Level Distribution Channel by company
Common - Query Zone Five List by pslCodVal
Common - Query Zone Four Subcode List
Common - Send communications to SFMC batch process
Common - Send communications to SFMC online process
Event - Query message list for event not processed
Event - update received event as processed
Menu - Query the url for each operation
Movement Record - Query movements record by third party
Reason event locking definition - Query Reason event locking definition
User info - Query Newtron User information
User info - Query data access by user code
Values/options list - Query Get tron lists
Variable Concepts Definition - Variable Concepts Definition
Variable Definition - Query a variable definition by company
Variable Definition - Query variable definition by company
Variable Definition - Query variable definition by coverage
Variable Definition - Query variable definition by line of business
Variable Definition - Query variable definition by third party
Variable Definition - Update variable definition by thrid party
Movement Record - Retrieve movement record by note value
